title: dramatic romantic fregola toast
description: a winey, molten, romantic malaysian dish featuring fregola, toast, and seafood. perfect for a candlelit evening in.
instructions: heat a wok over medium-high heat and add garlic butter until melted.
add fregola pasta and cook for 2 minutes.
add soya sauce and fish sauce and stir well.
add wok-seared scallops and stir for 1 minute.
add grated ginger and chili flakes and stir for 30 seconds.
add honey and stir until combined.
to toast bread, spread a small amount of garlic butter on each slice and grill until golden brown.
place toasted bread slices on individual plates.
top each bread slice with a portion of fregola mixture, a scallop, and cilantro petals.
serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
serve with additional garlic butter if desired for extra indulgence.
drizzle with a little extra soya sauce if desired for added umami flavor.
